ddls:
CREATE TABLE "terrains" (
  "terrain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each terrain type */,
  "terrain_name" TEXT /* Name of the terrain type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the terrain type */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Average elevation of the terrain */,
  "slope_percentage" REAL /* Average slope percentage of the terrain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("terrain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "land_uses" (
  "land_use_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each land use type */,
  "land_use_name" TEXT /* Name of the land use type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the land use type */,
  "population_density" INTEGER /* Population density of the area */,
  "building_density" INTEGER /* Building density of the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("land_use_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_controls" (
  "access_control_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control type */,
  "access_control_name" TEXT /* Name of the access control type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the access control type */,
  "control_type" TEXT /* Type of control measure (e.g., traffic lights, roundabouts, stop signs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_control_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation type */,
  "operation_name" TEXT /* Name of the operation type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the operation type */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the road (e.g., open, closed, partially closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "administrative_systems" (
  "ad_sys_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrative system */,
  "ad_sys_name" TEXT /* Name of the administrative system */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the administrative system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ad_sys_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "government_controls" (
  "gov_cont_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each government control type */,
  "gov_cont_name" TEXT /* Name of the government control type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the government control type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gov_cont_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "functional_classes" (
  "func_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each functional class */,
  "func_class_name" TEXT /* Name of the functional class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the functional class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("func_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pavement_types" (
  "pavement_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pavement type */,
  "pavement_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the pavement type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pavement type */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the pavement in years */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the pavement (e.g., good, fair, poor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pavement_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accident being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_factors" (
  "risk_factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk factor */,
  "risk_factor_name" TEXT /* Name of the risk factor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the risk factor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accident_risk_factors" (
  "accident_risk_factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accident-risk factor link */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accident */,
  "risk_factor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the risk factor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accident_risk_factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accident_risk_factors_risk_factor_id FOREIGN KEY ("risk_factor_id") REFERENCES risk_factors ("risk_factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the report */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the report */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the report was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name")
)
